# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
services:
- name: service1
  url: http://service1-upstream.com
  tags:
  - api-gateway
- name: service2
  url: http://service2-upstream.com
  tags:
  - api-gateway

routes:
- name: route1
  hosts:
  - api.example.com
  paths:
  - /service1
  strip_path: true
  service: service1
  plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
      - apikey
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      limit_by: consumer
      policy: local
      period: 60
      max_requests: 50

- name: route2
  hosts:
  - api.example.com
  paths:
  - /service2
  strip_path: true
  service: service2
  plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
      - apikey
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      limit_by: consumer
      policy: local
      period: 60
      max_requests: 50

consumers:
- username: consumer1
  custom_id: consumer1-id
  tags:
  - api-gateway
- username: consumer2
  custom_id: consumer2-id
  tags:
  - api-gateway

plugins:
- name: key-auth
  config:
    hide_credentials: true
